message:
perf(io): increase read_ext CHUNK from 1KiB to 8KiB, remove dead Lines field

read_ext.rs: Increase the internal CHUNK constant from 1024 to 8192
in both ReadToEnd and ReadToString futures. The 1KiB chunk size caused
excessive polling for moderate reads; 8KiB aligns with common OS page
sizes and typical TCP segment sizes.

lines.rs: Remove the unused bytes_read field from Lines<R>. It was
written to but never read, producing dead stores on every poll
iteration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
